sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَوْمُ الاِمْتِحَانِ فِي يَوْمِ الثُّلَاثَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Dan ispita bio je u utorak.
sentences.translationEn: The exam day was on Tuesday.

sentences.arabic: ذَاكَرَتْ فَاطِمَةُ دُرُوسَهَا كَثِيرًا فِي اللَّيْلَةِ السَّابِقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Fatima je prethodne noći puno učila.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima studied her lessons a lot the previous night.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَتْ إِلَى المَدْرَسَةِ مُبَكِّرًا وَجَلَسَتْ فِي مَقْعَدِهَا.
sentences.translation: Došla je u školu rano i sjela na svoje mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: She came to school early and sat in her seat.

sentences.translation: Mirno je odgovorila na sva pitanja.
sentences.translationEn: She answered all the questions calmly.

sentences.arabic: حَصَلَتْ فَاطِمَةُ عَلَى دَرَجَةٍ عَالِيَةٍ فِي الاِمْتِحَانِ.
sentences.translation: Fatima je dobila visoku ocjenu na ispitu.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima got a high grade on the exam.
